pinyin: xiu4 hong2 fu4 xuan2 mu4 que4
defs: (bird species of China) rusty-flanked treecreeper (Certhia nipalensis)
(bird species of China) slaty-backed flycatcher (Ficedula erithacus)
(bird species of China) rusty-bellied shortwing (Brachypteryx hyperythra)
(bird species of China) rusty-cheeked scimitar babbler (Erythrogenys erythrogenys)
(bird species of China) rusty-fronted barwing (Actinodura egertoni)
